note: Test-first card: does RAW + a speed-up LoRA match the Turbo transformer? If yes, drop ~24.5GB of Turbo weights and move Krea2 to the Qwen-Edit runtime tier-radio shape. Negative-prompt gating is currently structural (cfg 1 discards it) and would be LOST in a single-card collapse - flagged in the card as a design decision.

summary: A/B testing started and completed in-session; card moves from test-first idea to design/ship work.

Retitled + description rewritten. Original framing (source a generic speed LoRA) was wrong: the LoRA is Turbo SVD-extracted FROM Raw, and the real driver is Turbo seed-lock, not disk saving. PASS at strength 1.0, both prompt modes, ~30pct faster at matched steps. Separate finding: krea2filterbypass3 (160B, 12-float delta on txtfusion.projector) suppresses watermarks baked into stock Krea2 RAW.

Handoff ede1dd84 created. A/B passed, LoRA dep + R2 upload verified, turbo toggle built but UNTESTED in-app. Remaining: workflow regen, Turbo ModelDef/dep deletion, progressStages, webp, consumer sweep, R2 deletes.

note: Krea2 4->2 collapse shipped and user-verified in-app (t2i/i2i/edit/detail/upscale). Sampler retuned to 25@cfg3.5 + 3-step skin pass, 130s->100s. Open: R2 turbo weight deletion (user, manual).
R2 Turbo weights deleted by user and verified gone (both Raw weights intact). Last open item closed; Krea2 4->2 collapse complete.
